title: × Disoselenicereus nothus
taxonomy: × Disoselenicereus nothus is a hybrid cactus species. It belongs to the Cactaceae family and the genus Disoselenicereus. × Disoselenicereus nothus is often classified as a hybrid between Disocactus speciosus and Selenicereus peyrieri. This classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Disoselenicereus genus. Further research may be needed to confirm its exact classification.
properties: × Disoselenicereus nothus has been reported to possess various therapeutic properties, with its extracts exhibiting antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. These properties are believed to contribute to its potential use in treating various health conditions, including wound healing and infections. The plant's extracts have also shown promise in inhibiting the growth of certain types of bacteria and fungi. Additionally, studies suggest that × Disoselenicereus nothus may have anti-cancer properties due to its ability to induce apoptosis in cancer cells. Further research is needed to fully understand the therapeutic potential of this plant species.
